translation.welcomeMessage: Please sign in with your Google account to access your Chronicon calendar.
translation.popupBlockedMessage: The browser blocked the pop-up window. Please ensure pop-ups are allowed for this site and try again.
translation.selectCalendarMessage: Please select a calendar to view events.
translation.noEventsMessage: No events available. Create one in the Grid view.
translation.noEventsMessageComprehensive: No events found. You can create a new one using the '+' button, or import events from other Google calendars associated with your account via the 'Import' menu.
translation.confirmDeleteEvent: Are you sure you want to delete the event "{{eventName}}"
translation.selectEventToSeeStats: Select an event to see its statistics.
translation.noDataTraditional: No data to display in traditional view.
translation.noDataStream: No data to display in stream view.
translation.importPageDescription: Select a calendar to import events into your Chronicon calendar. This will copy the selected events, including their recurrence rules, without modifying the original calendar.
translation.noImportableEventsFound: No importable events found in the selected calendar.
translation.pleaseSelectCalendar: Please select a calendar to view events.
translation.chroniconCalendarNotFound: Chronicon calendar not found. Please sign in again.
translation.skippedExistingEvents: Skipped {{count}} events that already exist in Chronicon.
translation.importErrorOccurred: An error occurred while importing "{{eventName}}". Some events may not have been imported.
